Quality.NextAction: Reproduce once, then run Stability Analyze.
Use the same launch path and compare whether the top fingerprint changes.
Export support package before WER evidence ages out.
Use generated LocalDumps/ProcDump commands only when stronger evidence is needed.
Install/use Microsoft tools only as needed: DxDiag, WPR, ProcDump, WinDbg, SFC, DISM.
Use Stability tab to correlate crash, GPU, security, and change lanes.

Quality.Evidence: No support package newer than the latest crash anchor.
Quality.NextAction: Build Support Zip immediately after the next crash.
Log each changed variable and result so repeated tests become useful evidence.

Plan.Action: Export Stability Workbench, run Support Zip, and note the exact crash fingerprint before changing anything.
Plan.KeepConstant: Same target, same launch path, same graphics settings, same account.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Baseline has crash event, fingerprint, timeline, and package artifacts.

Plan.Action: Launch once with no new fixes to confirm the crash still reproduces.
Plan.KeepConstant: Do not change drivers, overlays, saves, config, or launch options between baseline and control.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Same fingerprint repeats, or the app stays stable and journal records that surprise result.

Plan.Action: Stop overlay, capture, tuning, input-hook, and performance-monitor tools for exactly one test.
Plan.KeepConstant: Leave save data, driver, Windows settings, and launch path unchanged.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Fingerprint disappears or changes when overlay/capture stack is absent.

Plan.Action: Test a clean graphics path: no capture overlay, stable power mode, then clean-install/update GPU driver only if evidence still points there.
Plan.KeepConstant: Do not wipe saves or change runtimes during the GPU-path test.
Plan.SuccessCheck: GPU/TDR rows stop appearing near crashes, or crash code/module changes.

Plan.Action: Repair VC++/.NET/DirectX/media prerequisites, then run one launch with all other variables frozen.
Plan.KeepConstant: Do not change GPU driver, saves, or overlays in the same attempt.
Plan.Evidence: 16x Access violation c0000005 module=StackHash_2264; 8x Access violation 0xc0000005 module=unknown

Plan.Action: With Steam Cloud off and backups present, run Deep Fresh for local save/cache/settings only.
Plan.KeepConstant: Keep overlays, driver, runtimes, and launch path unchanged for this test.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Fresh local data is recreated and the crash either clears or repeats with the same fingerprint.

Plan.Action: Use a Microsoft clean-boot style isolation only after simpler one-variable tests are logged.
Plan.KeepConstant: Re-enable services/startup items in groups so the journal can identify the culprit.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Crash reproduces only when a specific service/startup group returns, or remains stable in clean boot.
Plan.Evidence: Used when no visible conflict process explains the crash.

Plan.Action: If the same fingerprint survives controlled tests, collect dump/WPR/ProcMon-style evidence and export a full package.
Plan.KeepConstant: Keep the repro short and targeted; do not leave heavy tracing enabled.
Plan.SuccessCheck: Support package contains dump/config/timeline/runbook/journal evidence tied to one fingerprint.
